meta.title: Unit 2 — Common & Proper Nouns (Test 4)
meta.subject: English Grammar
meta.description: Classify nouns and fix capitalization errors in sentences.

questions.question: Which word is a proper noun?
questions.explanation: "Pikachu" is a proper noun — it's the specific name of a character.

questions.question: "February" is a proper noun.
questions.explanation: Yes! February is a month name — a proper noun that must be capitalized.

questions.question: What type of noun is "Costco"? (common or proper)
questions.hint: It's the name of a specific store
questions.explanation: Costco is a proper noun — it's the specific name of a store.

questions.question: Which word is a common noun?
questions.explanation: "dog" is a common noun — it refers to any dog, not a specific one.

questions.question: In a sentence, the word "america" should have a capital A.
questions.explanation: Yes! America is a proper noun (country name) — it must be capitalized: America.

questions.question: What type of noun is "Mother's Day"? (common or proper)
questions.explanation: Mother's Day is a proper noun — specific holiday names must be capitalized.

questions.question: Sort these words: Common Noun or Proper Noun?
questions.explanation: dog/book = general words (common). Pikachu/Costco/America = specific names (proper).

questions.question: In the sentence "Pikachu is cute and yellow," the word "Pikachu" is correctly capitalized.
questions.explanation: Yes! Pikachu is a proper noun (a character name) — it must be capitalized.

questions.question: Which sentence has correct capitalization?
options: This summer, I will take a trip to america.
This summer, I will take a trip to America.
This Summer, I will take a trip to America.
this summer, I will take a trip to America.
questions.explanation: "America" is a proper noun (country name) and must be capitalized. "summer" is a common noun.

questions.question: What type of noun is "Thursday"? (common or proper)
questions.hint: Days of the week are proper nouns
questions.explanation: Thursday is a proper noun — days of the week are specific names and must be capitalized.

questions.question: Arrange the words to form a correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Pikachu is cute and yellow." Pikachu is a proper noun.

questions.question: Sort these words: Common Noun or Proper Noun?
questions.explanation: home/corn/hotel = general words (common). Ms. Jane/Father's Day = specific names (proper).

questions.question: "Moon Festival" is a proper noun.
questions.explanation: Yes! Moon Festival is a specific holiday name — a proper noun that must be capitalized.

questions.question: Which word in this sentence is a proper noun? "We like to go to Costco."
questions.explanation: "Costco" is a proper noun — the specific name of a store.

questions.question: We like to play uno. Fix the game name: write it correctly.
questions.hint: A specific game name is a proper noun
questions.explanation: "Uno" is a proper noun (specific game name) — it should be capitalized.

questions.question: Arrange the words to form a correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Correct: "We like to go to Costco." Costco is a proper noun.

questions.question: Which sentence has ALL words correctly capitalized?
options: My teacher's name is Ms. Chen.
My Teacher's name is ms. Chen.
My teacher's name is ms. chen.
my teacher's name is Ms. Chen.
questions.explanation: Only "Ms. Chen" (a proper noun) is capitalized. "teacher" is a common noun and stays lowercase.

questions.question: In the sentence "I like to play Uno with my friends," every word is correctly capitalized.
questions.explanation: Yes! "Uno" is a proper noun (game name) and is correctly capitalized. Other words are common nouns.

questions.question: Sort these words: Common Noun or Proper Noun?
questions.explanation: friend/school = general words (common). Pikachu/June/FamilyMart = specific names (proper).

questions.question: We love going to jiufen village. Fix the place name.
questions.hint: A specific place name is a proper noun — capitalize key words
questions.explanation: "Jiufen Village" is a proper noun (specific place name) — capitalize both words.
